issues.description: Missing condition check for 'Your Leader has the {Navy} type'. The effect should first check LeaderHasType:Navy, then conditionally execute the trash action.
TrashFromHand requires a 'count' parameter to specify '2 cards'. Current filter is incomplete.
Action chain is reversed. Should be: IF (leader has Navy) THEN (trash 2 Navy cards) THEN (draw 3). Current structure does not properly gate the trash action on the condition.
